mapper.select:
SELECT tl.*,
top_tier.tier_name AS top_tier, jug_tier.tier_name AS jug_tier, mid_tier.tier_name AS mid_tier, ad_tier.tier_name AS ad_tier, sup_tier.tier_name AS sup_tier
FROM team_list tl
LEFT OUTER JOIN streamer_tier top_tier ON top_tier.tournament_no = tl.tournament_id AND top_tier.streamer_no = tl.team_top AND top_tier.tier_position = 'TOP'
LEFT OUTER JOIN streamer_tier jug_tier ON jug_tier.tournament_no = tl.tournament_id AND jug_tier.streamer_no = tl.team_jug AND jug_tier.tier_position = 'JUG'
LEFT OUTER JOIN streamer_tier mid_tier ON mid_tier.tournament_no = tl.tournament_id AND mid_tier.streamer_no = tl.team_mid AND mid_tier.tier_position = 'MID'
LEFT OUTER JOIN streamer_tier ad_tier ON ad_tier.tournament_no = tl.tournament_id AND ad_tier.streamer_no = tl.team_ad AND ad_tier.tier_position = 'AD'
LEFT OUTER JOIN streamer_tier sup_tier ON sup_tier.tournament_no = tl.tournament_id AND sup_tier.streamer_no = tl.team_sup AND sup_tier.tier_position = 'SUP'
WHERE tl.tournament_id = #{tournamentId}
ORDER BY CASE tl.team_ranking WHEN '우승' THEN 1 WHEN '준우승' THEN 2 WHEN '4강' THEN 3 WHEN '본선진출' THEN 4 ELSE 99 END
mapper.update: update team set team_name=#{teamName}, team_top=#{teamTop}, team_jug=#{teamJug}, team_mid=#{teamMid}, team_ad=#{teamAd}, team_sup=#{teamSup}, team_ranking=#{teamRanking} where team_id=#{teamId}
